name: dishcovery
description: Dishcovery is a social media application for sharing and discovering home-cooked meals. It allows users to log their recipes, categorize their ingredients, and interact with a community of food lovers by liking, saving, and commenting on posts.

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w client" "npm run dev -w server"
scripts.start: concurrently "npm run preview -w client" "npm run start -w server"
scripts.preview: npm run build -w client && npm run start
